name: deployment-completion-notifier
description: Sends enhanced notifications for Salesforce deployment completions

notification.title: ✅ Salesforce Deployment Complete

comments.matcher_explained: This notification only triggers when the message contains deployment-related keywords AND status is success/completed AND operation took at least 60 seconds
comments.actions_explained: Action buttons provide quick access to common post-deployment tasks
comments.variables: Template variables {orgAlias}, {duration}, etc. are automatically extracted from the notification context
